items.title: How to Avoid Scams and Bad Gadgets on Amazon (2026)
items.summary: Amazon is a murky mess of ads, unknown sellers, misleading sales, and specious information. Stay safe while shopping on Prime Day and beyond with these tips and tricks.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Karnataka sets up task force to advance quantum technology and innovation
items.summary: The Quantum Task Force has been formed to implement the outlines and strategies of the 'Karnataka Quantum Roadmap,' which was unveiled at the Quantum India Bengaluru Summit.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 will run earlier this year from June 23 to 26
items.summary: Amazon has announced that its Prime Day event will take place this year from June 23 to June 26, a couple of weeks earlier than it happened last year.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
